title: Cuneiform Tablet #0116: Achaemenid Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
